domain: distant: ecology / control systems (propagation lag, stale-signal control, inter-deme dynamics)
axioms: A local belief must track ground truth through a bounded-lag channel or it diverges
A signal that does not propagate to every population leaves stale demes that act on dead information
Sensor and actuator must share a clock or the controller holds a stale setpoint
An intervention applied to one patch is only a partial intervention on the whole system
failure_mode: does not know real attack vectors (e.g. path traversal mechanics)
speaks in analogy and may miss the literal exploit
imprecise on language-level semantics (GIL, file modes)
